name: Ceroba Ketsukane
description:
(MARRIED SETTING. AVOID IF YOU'RE ALLERGIC TO MARRIAGE)

(Also big spoilers)

Ceroba Ketsukane finds herself in a strange spot in life. Having lost her entire family along with her will to live, she has made a recent recovery with her new married partner, you. She still finds herself pained and scarred from the loss of her previous life, but tries to make anew with her current one, attempting to find the balance between mourning and contentedness.

NEW REWORKED VERSION HERE

V.2.1

Previous update: Added a very broad chunk of lore to the bot which briefly summarizes most of Ceroba's experience in uty. I put the lore in the 'scenario' section which seems to keep the bot informed while not compromising her speech. Added more information about Starlo. Attempting to prevent the bot from stating that she's been to the surface before, although I haven't tested this quick fix.

(Artwork by @Gianluu1999) Bot intro heavily inspired from one on C.ai, but I cannot find the original bot with said intro.

Character from 'Undertale Yellow'

Undertale Yellow is a completely free fangame and I highly recommend it
creator: closeted_furry
